workout.warmup: Incline walk · 8–10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline — NOT optional on lower day, this is your back warmup. Especially important after 8 days off and on the road.
workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline. Skip if session hits 65 min.
workout.coach_note: Rescheduled from July 1 — you did a long bike ride Wednesday instead, so legs got a day to recover before this. First lower since June 23. You're at Planet Fitness: no pendulum squat or plate-loaded hip-thrust machine, so this is built around PF equipment (leg press, leg curl, leg extension, Smith/DB glutes, DB lunges). Leg press is up in the rotation anyway. Weights are best-guess targets — PF machines run different increments/angles, so calibrate to feel: last 1–2 reps hard but clean. Quads/glutes may still be a bit taxed from the ride — if leg press feels heavy early, start lower and build. Get a pea shake in beforehand, keep RDL off, keep the warmup honest.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: Quad compound. Rotation says leg press today (pendulum was last lower). PF leg press is likely a different machine than home — start lighter to gauge it, then work up to a load where set 3 of 10 is genuinely hard. Controlled tempo, no locking out at the top, knees tracking over toes.

exercises.name: Seated/Lying Leg Curl
exercises.note: Hamstrings — your weak link, so don't rush it. You got 12 on set 3 at 77 lb on June 23, which earns a bump. On a PF machine, find the next notch up where you cap at 10–12 with the last rep tough. If hamstrings feel tight (old left-ham caution), hold weight and cap the last set at 10.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Hip Thrust (or DB Hip Thrust)
exercises.note: No plate-loaded hip thrust machine at PF. Use the Smith bar across the hips with a pad, or a single heavy DB on the hips, shoulders on a bench. Last machine session your lower back was tight and you held at 180 — be conservative here, prioritize a hard glute squeeze at the top over load. Full hip extension, NO hyperextension at the top.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.note: Quad accessory and a variety swap — PF always has this one. Squeeze hard at the top, slow 2-count down. Pick a weight where 12–15 burns on the last set. Easy on the back, good to add while traveling.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge (DB)
exercises.note: Hold at 30 lb — you chose 30 over 35 last time and got clean, controlled reps with good activation, so confirm 30 again before bumping. Long step, drive through the heel, knee drive at the top. If space is tight at PF, do reverse lunges in place.

exercises.name: Core Circuit (Back-Safe) — 2 rounds
exercises.detail: Pallof Press 40 lb x 10/side → Bird Dog 8/side → Plank w/ Shoulder Tap 10 taps/side
exercises.note: Fresh combo — different from your last two sessions. All back-safe anti-rotation/stability work. Pallof on a cable at 40 lb (your confirmed weight); if no cable free, sub a band. Slow and controlled, brace the whole time.
